name: default makefile compiler path
detail: makefile-original uses g++; on this host that resolves to /usr/bin/g++.

name: default build probe
detail: make -f makefile-original Minuit_fit.exe fails immediately because Apple clang++ does not accept -fopenmp in the default CXXFLAGS.

name: post-openmp compile probe
detail: With CXX=g++-14, compilation gets past the OpenMP frontend issue but then fails on missing boost/numeric/odeint.hpp.
